commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fe92ef21ce51888cba717edd999a4ef90772a28b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR keeps generated-media tasks active through completion delivery, adds image/music/video duplicate guards, adds direct generated-media fallback delivery, and wraps prompt-stream transcript appends in the session write-lock context.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: start one session-backed image task, then call `image_generate` with a different prompt. The PR's own source and test assert the second call returns the active task, while current main and docs allow distinct image prompts to start.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a maintainer policy/compatibility decision around image task concurrency plus a docs update, not a safe unattended repair lane yet.

target.title: fix: directly deliver completed media fallback
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep generated media tasks active until completion delivery is confirmed, so duplicate/retry checks see the task while delivery is still pending.
- Add duplicate and recent-completion guards for image, video, and music generation requests.
- Add a direct generated-media fallback when requester-agent/message-tool delivery misses the completed media, while preserving the active wake/message-tool handoff path from `upstream/main`.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts src/agents/tools/media-generate-background-shared.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/music-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-background.test.ts src/agents/image-generation-task-status.test.ts src/agents/video-generation-task-status.test.ts src/agents/tools/music-generate-tool.status.test.ts src/agents/tools/video-generate-tool.status.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts`
- `pnpm changed:lanes --json --base upstream/main`
- `pnpm check:changed --base upstream/main`
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `git merge-tree HEAD upstream/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Generated media completions keep the task/session delivery path active until completion delivery is confirmed. If active requester wake and requester-agent/message-tool delivery miss the generated media, the PR fallback posts one direct channel media message to the original chat.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout at `fe92ef21ce51888cba717edd999a4ef90772a28b` (`pnpm openclaw --help` reported `OpenClaw 2026.5.19 (fe92ef2)`) against live Discord channel transport. Target channel is redacted as `discord channel:...5762`; the live fallback message id was `1506455834782072842`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran an inline `node --import tsx --input-type=module` proof script from the PR checkout. The script resolved command-scoped Discord secrets for the configured channel, loaded the configured Discord plugin, called `deliverSubagentAnnouncement(...)` from `src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.ts`, forced active requester wake to return `queued:false` with `source_reply_delivery_mode_mismatch`, forced the requester-agent handoff to return no message-tool/media delivery evidence, and let the PR fallback call the real `sendMessage(...)` transport. Then I fetched the exact Discord message by id with `handleDiscordAction({ action: "fetchMessage", guildId: "<redacted>", channelId: "...5762", messageId: "1506455834782072842" })` and checked the active session mirror line with `sed -n '19p' <state>/agents/main/sessions/6c7c13d6-d515-4cf4-ad90-ba2a84ef203f.jsonl | jq ...`.

Evidence after fix: Redacted console output from the live proof run:

```text
active requester wake:
  waitForTranscriptCommit: true
  sourceReplyDeliveryMode: message_tool_only
  steeringMode: all

requester-agent handoff:
  method: agent
  expectFinal: true
  deliver: false
  channel: discord
  to: channel:...5762
  sourceReplyDeliveryMode: message_tool_only
  idempotencyKey: PR84371-MEDIA-FALLBACK-fe92ef2-1779237455145
  mediaEvents: 1

direct fallback result:
  delivered: true
  path: direct
  phase: direct-primary
  phaseDelivered: true

sendMessage receipt:
  messageId: 1506455834782072842
  platformMessageIds: [1506455834782072842]
  parts: [{ kind: media, index: 0 }]
```

Exact live Discord readback after the fallback send:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "message": {
    "id": "1506455834782072842",
    "content": "The generated image is ready.",
    "timestampUtc": "2026-05-20T00:37:39.608Z",
    "authorBot": true,
    "attachmentCount": 1,
    "attachment": {
      "filename": "PR84371-MEDIA-FALLBACK-fe92ef2-1779237455145.png",
      "size": 91,
      "width": 1,
      "height": 1,
      "content_type": "image/png"
    }
  }
}
```

Transcript mirror proof from the active Discord session after delivery:

```json
{
  "type": "message",
  "timestamp": "2026-05-20T00:37:39.973Z",
  "role": "assistant",
  "text": "PR84371-MEDIA-FALLBACK-fe92ef2-1779237455145.png",
  "provider": "openclaw",
  "model": "delivery-mirror",
  "stopReason": "stop",
  "idempotencyKey": "PR84371-MEDIA-FALLBACK-fe92ef2-177923...generated-media-direct"
}
```

Observed result after fix: The fallback produced exactly one Discord bot message in the original channel with the fixed completion text and exactly one `image/png` attachment. The active wake/requester-agent message-tool path was attempted first and missed media, then the direct fallback delivered once and the active session mirror committed after the send.

What was not tested: Mantis Telegram Desktop visual proof did not run because workflow `26133709129` skipped downstream proof jobs after reporting actor `fuller-stack-dev` had only read permission. This proof uses live Discord transport, live Discord readback, and the real session mirror path instead. The media generator provider itself was not called; the proof injected the completed generated-media event at the delivery boundary while the fallback transport/readback/transcript surfaces were real.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
